summary: TWO_COLUMN: NumberPlane with BLUE level-set rings of L(w_1, w_2) = (w_1-1.5)² + 5(w_2-0.5)² + 2·sin(w_1)·cos(w_2); GREEN min marker; 60-step precomputed GD trajectory from (-2, 2.2) drawn via always_redraw YELLOW trail + current dot. ValueTracker step_tr advances iterations; live panel with step, w_1, w_2, L, ‖∇L‖, η.
